mano_cua.result_summary: Vue2项目vue-hot-reload-api报错导致页面空白。控制台错误：Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '_lifecycleHooks') at exports.install (vue-hot-reload-api/dist/index.js)。#app div为空，Vue应用未初始化。尝试了根路径/mint-ui/和cell路径/mint-ui/#!/cell，均空白。无法加载组件列表，无法测试Cell组件value+is-link布局。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page blank due to vue-hot-reload-api error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '_lifecycleHooks'). Vue app failed to initialize. Cannot test Cell component.
